name: Yumiko | Tomboy... Best Friend...?
description:
What Could Have Been


Yumiko is... or maybe was your best friend. Ever since first grade, you were together, always somewhere nearby each other. But lately the distance between you is growing. At this point you barely communicate with each other. But before she began distancing herself, she was acting odd. Leaning on you, using your arm as a pillow... Even holding hands once. But you haven't paid attention to it. But now it's all gone and even more. Are you even friends at this point? Today, during a lunch break, you decide to approach her.



Music to listen with this bot: What Could Have Been

Artist: あるふぁ-Alpha-TYPE (@ALPHA_TYPE_01)

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.


Some angst for you. Why such scenario? Because sometimes things like that happen. We are too stupid to realize something, too blind to see someone close to us. Too dense to get hints (not coping, trust). Let me know in reviews if you like or dislike the bot, pretty please. I hope you will enjoy it.

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it
creator: kokitadain
